omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
30. The Controller collects the following personal data of the User:
1. User's name and surname
2. User's image (the so-called avatar) – optional
3. contact details: e-mail address, website address, links to the User's accounts on social media sites – optional
4. User's birth date – optional (publication of this information is at the User's discretion)
5. location information (town/city, country) – optional (publication of this information is at the User's discretion)
6. information about the User's skin type – optional (publication of this information is at the User's discretion)

30. The Controller collects the following personal data of the User:
1. User's name and surname
2. User's image (the so-called avatar) – optional
3. contact details: e-mail address, website address, links to the User's accounts on social media sites – optional

5. location information (town/city, country) – optional (publication of this information is at the User's discretion)
6. information about the User's skin type – optional (publication of this information is at the User's discretion)
27. The Application may require access to: the gallery, camera, calendar and notifications.
